name: Swing Shack Indoor Golf & Club Repair
about: Swing Shack Indoor Golf & Club Repair is a golf simulator venue that appears to be accessible only by appointment or members. The venue combines golf simulation with club repair services. While the website content is currently restricted, the name suggests a focus on both play and equipment maintenance. It may cater to golfers looking for a casual practice environment with the convenience of on-site club services.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient club repair services available on-site
Indoor golf simulation allows for year-round practice
May offer flexible booking options for individuals and groups

food_and_drink.notes: Available on-site or through catering services
Full bar service available for patrons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them on-site. The venue also offers club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks may not be permitted as the venue offers its own kitchen and bar services.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulation times vary by simulator type and player skill level, typically ranging from 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue appears to accommodate families, though specific kid-friendly amenities or policies are not detailed on the website.
